message:
feat(linalg,ufunc): add 2x2 matrix decomposition ops and expand ufunc dispatch

fnp-linalg:
- Add finite-matrix validation helper (rejects NaN/Inf entries with
  NormDetRankPolicyViolation error for norm/det/rank/pinv operations)
- Implement det_2x2() — computes 2x2 determinant via ad-bc formula
- Implement slogdet_2x2() — sign + log-determinant decomposition with
  proper handling of positive, negative, and zero determinants
- Implement inv_2x2() — classical adjugate/determinant inverse with
  epsilon-based singularity detection
- Add singular_values_2x2() — computes SVD singular values via the
  characteristic polynomial of A^T*A, needed for matrix_rank and pinv

fnp-ufunc:
- Extend ufunc dispatch with additional operation support and improved
  error handling for broadcasting edge cases in high-rank tensors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
